meta.summary: MCScanX collinearity and synteny analysis toolkit with core C++ programs, Java plotters, and Perl downstream analysis helpers.
meta.description: MCScanX collinearity and synteny analysis toolkit with core C++ programs, Java plotters, and Perl downstream analysis helpers.

test: grep -Fx '1.0.0' /opt/mcscanx/VERSION >/dev/null && MCScanX -h 2>&1 | grep -F '[Usage]' >/dev/null && MCScanX_h -h 2>&1 | grep -F '[Usage]' >/dev/null && duplicate_gene_classifier -h 2>&1 | grep -F '[Usage]' >/dev/null
detect_collinear_tandem_arrays 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && detect_syntenic_tandem_arrays 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && dissect_multiple_alignment 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null

dot_plotter 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java dot_plotter' >/dev/null && dual_synteny_plotter 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java dual_synteny_plotter' >/dev/null && circle_plotter 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java circle_plotter' >/dev/null && bar_plotter 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java bar_plotter' >/dev/null

family_circle_plotter 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java family_circle_plotter' >/dev/null && family_tree_plotter 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java family_tree_plotter' >/dev/null && family_tree_plotter_show_length 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java family_tree_plotter' >/dev/null && family_tree_plotter_chr 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java family_tree_plotter' >/dev/null

add_ka_and_ks_to_collinearity.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && add_kaks_to_synteny.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && group_collinear_genes.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && perl -MBio::SeqIO -MBio::Tools::Run::Alignment::Clustalw -e 1 && clustalw -help 2>&1 | grep -i 'clustal' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mcscanx-core && cd /tmp/taf-mcscanx-core && printf 'aa1	aa1g1	100	200
bb1	bb1g1	100	200
aa1	aa1g2	300	400
bb1	bb1g2	300	400
' > toy.gff && printf 'aa1g1	bb1g1	100.00	100	0	0	1	100	1	100	1e-50	200
aa1g2	bb1g2	100.00	100	0	0	1	100	1	100	1e-40	180
' > toy.blast && MCScanX toy -s 2 -a >/tmp/taf-mcscanx-core.log 2>&1 && test -s toy.collinearity && grep -F '# MATCH_SIZE: 2' toy.collinearity >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mcscanx-h && cd /tmp/taf-mcscanx-h && printf 'aa1	aa1g1	100	200
bb1	bb1g1	100	200
aa1	aa1g2	300	400
bb1	bb1g2	300	400
' > toy.gff && printf 'aa1g1	bb1g1	1e-50
aa1g2	bb1g2	1e-40
' > toy.homology && MCScanX_h toy -s 2 -a >/tmp/taf-mcscanx-h.log 2>&1 && test -s toy.collinearity && grep -F '# MATCH_SIZE: 2' toy.collinearity >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mcscanx-group && cd /tmp/taf-mcscanx-group && printf '0\taa1g1\tbb1g1\n' > collinear.txt && group_collinear_genes.pl -i collinear.txt -o groups.txt && grep -F 'aa1g1' groups.txt >/dev/null && printf 'fam1\taa1g1\tbb1g1\n' > families.txt && detect_collinearity_within_gene_families.pl -i families.txt -d collinear.txt -o family-collinear.txt && grep -F 'aa1g1:bb1g1' family-collinear.txt >/dev/null
